overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a modern urban waterfront district. The character traverses an elevated plaza between contemporary office buildings, descends to a riverside promenade, and returns to street level. The environment features clean architectural lines, concrete walkways, and a hazy city skyline in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza between modern office buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the urban plaza between modern office buildings

entered.detail: multi-story concrete and glass office building with horizontal lines
multi-story concrete parking structure or office building
rectangular planters containing green shrubs and foliage
large rectangular planter with blooming flowers

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide urban plaza paved with brick-patterned tiles, flanked by modern office buildings on both sides. Landscaping planters with greenery line the walkway, and a few distant pedestrians are visible ahead.

events.description: view opens up to reveal the river and bridge ahead as the plaza widens

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfront overlook with the river and bridge coming into view

entered.detail: wide river with calm water visible in the distance
arched metal bridge spanning the river
hazy skyline of tall buildings across the river
low concrete safety barrier at the edge of the overlook

segments.scene_description: As the character continues forward, the plaza opens up to reveal a panoramic view of the river and a distant arched bridge. The right-side building falls away, and the city skyline becomes visible across the water.

events.description: character begins descending stairs to lower waterfront level
boat passes by on the river below

agents.ego_description: descending the concrete stairs to reach the lower waterfront walkway

notable_agents.action: small motorboat with blue canopy moving along the river

entered.detail: elevated concrete viewing platform at the top of the stairs
wide concrete stairs with metal handrails descending to water level
metal guardrail along the edge of the overlook
lower level concrete walkway along the river
black ornate street lamp along the waterfront path

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the edge of the plaza and descends a wide concrete stairwell to the lower waterfront level. A small motorboat passes by on the river as the character reaches the bottom of the stairs.

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete waterfront promenade next to the river

entered.detail: elevated highway or railway bridge crossing over the river
tall metal lattice tower with power lines
tall concrete wall supporting the upper plaza level

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the lower waterfront path, with the river on the left and a high concrete retaining wall on the right. An industrial highway overpass and electrical transmission tower are visible ahead against the hazy sky.

events.description: character ascends the ramp back to the upper plaza level

agents.ego_description: ascending the concrete ramp to return to the upper plaza level

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the plaza near the building entrance

entered.detail: sloped concrete ramp leading back up to the plaza level
mature leafy trees providing shade in the plaza
large planter with yellow flowering plants

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a concrete ramp back to the upper plaza level, leaving the waterfront behind. The scene returns to the landscaped plaza with trees and flower planters, where another pedestrian is visible walking near the building entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a modern urban plaza that descends to a riverside promenade before returning to the elevated city level. It begins with the character walking through a wide, brick-patterned plaza flanked by contemporary office buildings and greenery. As the character moves forward, the architecture opens up to reveal a panoramic view of a distant arched bridge and the city skyline across the water. The scene then shifts as the character descends a wide concrete stairwell to the lower waterfront, passing a motorboat on the river before walking along a path bordered by a high retaining wall and an industrial highway overpass. Finally, the camera follows the character up a concrete ramp, leaving the hazy riverfront behind to return to the landscaped plaza and its flower planters.
